full_text:
Quan Yi 全禕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Quan Yi (全禕). Conspired with Geng Ji and Wei Huang to abduct the Han Emperor. Quan Yi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
